content:
Hey DEV, I'm Tobore. Let's actually connect.

I've been on here for a while now, mostly writing and lurking, but I realized I don't actually know that many of you. So this is me fixing that.

I'm based in Port Harcourt, Nigeria. I build websites, and I also do technical documentation and content writing. Most of what I write comes from projects I've actually built or shipped, not stuff I read about somewhere. I currently hold the DEV React Top Author badge and I recently won the Google I/O 2026 Writing Challenge for Technical Writers.

Right now I'm building my career, taking on freelance dev and writing work, and studying for AWS SAA-C03 on the side. I also run BuildWithTee, which is basically my attempt at building in public: code, write, connect.

What I'm looking for here

• Other devs and technical writers to swap notes with

• People building things in public who want an accountability buddy or just someone to bounce ideas off

• Anyone doing tech documentation or content writing who wants to talk shop

• People across continents, not just Nigeria or Africa. I want this to be genuinely global

If any of that sounds like you, drop a comment. Tell me what you're working on, what you're learning, or just say hi. I reply to everyone.

Let's connect: LinkedIn

Email's in my bio.

Looking forward to actually knowing some of you instead of just reading your posts silently 😅
